allowed_pre_holdout_fixes: implementation errors that do not change the fixed economic rule
data_identity_rule: Binance official ETHUSDT USD-M 2h monthly klines verified against adjacent .CHECKSUM plus public funding history snapshot hashes
development_gate: 2021-2023 count >= 60; base mean > 0; at least two positive calendar years; 8-trade circular-block bootstrap 95% mean lower bound > 0
holdout_release_rule: Open 2024-2025 only after a threshold passes the development gate and selection.json fixes it; open 2026H1 only after evaluation; otherwise stop and preserve both intervals
known_prior_exposure: BTCUSDT 2021-2026 was exposed by the earlier funding-carry study; no ETHUSDT historical outcomes were inspected before this checkpoint
question: Can a fixed 2h ETHUSDT extreme-return contrarian trade survive actual funding and 32 bp round-trip modeled cost after selecting only 2/3/4 sigma on development data?
